offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 orders/month, stock shortages cause missed sales opportunities. We provide inventory alerts instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Stock shortages leading to missed sales opportunities.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for Etsy seller tools
try_it: Let users try low stock alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing inventory data
